page: Amazon Web Services i3en.6xlarge is a storage-optimized instance designed for high-throughput, data-intensive workloads. Built on the Nitro hypervisor, it is powered by an Intel Xeon 8259CL x86_64 processor with 24 dedicated vCPUs and 12 physical cores operating at 3.1 GHz. The CPU features 35 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and AES cryptography.

The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of DDR4 memory running at 3 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. A key hardware highlight is the inclusion of 15,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, offering massive capacity for local data caching and high-speed retrieval. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates a clear performance profile. Single-core execution is relatively weak, as shown by stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores falling in the bottom 25%. However, multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and decompression tasks consistently reach average tier levels. Database operations, including Redis SET operations and Passmark database tests, also perform in the middle 50% tier.

Given its high storage-to-vCPU ratio and massive local NVMe capacity, the instance offers strong qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that require high resource density without needing top-tier single-core CPU speeds. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, NoSQL data stores, transactional systems, and distributed file systems.
description: Amazon Web Services i3en.6xlarge is a storage-optimized instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8259CL processor with 24 vCPUs and 12 physical cores running at 3.1 GHz on the Nitro hypervisor. It features 192.0 GB of DDR4 memory and a massive 15,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, alongside 25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. While single-core performance benchmarks like stress-ng and Geekbench register in the lower 25th percentile, multi-core execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations consistently achieve average tier results. This hardware profile offers high storage density and qualitative cost efficiency for data-intensive applications. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, NoSQL stores, and transactional workloads requiring high-capacity local NVMe storage.
og_description: Amazon Web Services i3en.6xlarge is a storage-optimized instance featuring 24 vCPUs, 192 GB DDR4 RAM, and 15,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, designed for high-capacity database and transactional workloads.

tagline: A storage-optimized instance delivering 15 TB of local NVMe SSD capacity and balanced multi-core performance for data-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 15,000 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Intel Xeon 8259CL processor with 24 dedicated vCPUs
192.0 GB of DDR4 memory at 3 GHz
Optimized for large-scale databases and NoSQL workloads
